steps.title: Fit the displayed line
steps.content: Use two approximate points on the line of best fit, such as $(24,10)$ and $(34,0)$.

steps.title: Predict at x = 32
steps.content: The fitted line has slope about $-1$, so at $x=32$ the prediction is between $2$ and $3$. Desmos evaluates the fitted model near $2$ to $2.4$ depending on exact graph reading.

steps.title: Choose the closest value
steps.content: The only choice between $2$ and $3$ is $2.4$, so choice C is correct.
